mapper.sql: A.EVENT_ID AS eventId , A.BSNS_YEAR AS bsnsYear , A.BSNS_CODE AS bsnsCode , A.EVENT_SVC_BGNDE AS eventSvcBeginDe , A.EVENT_SVC_ENDDE AS eventSvcEndDe , A.SVC_USE_NMPR_CO AS svcUseNmprCo , A.CHARGER_NM AS chargerNm , A.EVENT_CN AS eventCn , A.EVENT_TY_CODE AS eventTyCode , A.EVENT_TY_CODE AS eventTyCodeNm , A.PRPARETG_CN AS prparetgCn , A.EVENT_CONFM_AT AS eventConfmAt , A.EVENT_CONFM_DE AS eventConfmDe , (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS frstRegisterNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_EVENT_INFO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.EVENT_SVC_BGNDE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_EVENT_INFO A WHERE 1=1
mapper.insert: UPDATE TB_EVENT_INFO SET LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=0
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_EVENT_INFO SET LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=0
